title: Sea Salt Scented Candle, Embossed Blue Glass Jar with Lid, Double Wick, 20 Hour Burn - Luxury Coastal Fragrance Gift - Tianshui Silk Road Collection
features: 🌊 LUXURY COASTAL FRAGRANCE Fill your home with a crisp blend of sea salt and ocean breeze. This premium double-wick candle delivers a calm, balanced burn and a fresh coastal ambience—ideal for unwinding in the evening or creating a spa-like feel in bathrooms and bedrooms.

💎 EMBOSSED BLUE GLASS STATEMENT PIECE Crafted in elegant Tianshui blue tinted glass, the ornate diamond lattice and beaded detailing catch and reflect light beautifully. Finished with a vintage-inspired decorative lid to protect the candle from dust, it makes a refined accent for coffee tables, mantels or bedside displays.

📏 PERFECTLY PROPORTIONED & CLEAN BURNING Compact yet impactful size (H 8.5 cm × W 10.5 cm) suits both small and large spaces without overpowering them. Provides approximately 20 hours of burn time, with dual cotton wicks ensuring an even melt pool and consistent fragrance throw.

♻️ REUSABLE KEEPSAKE JAR Designed to last beyond the candle. Once finished, simply clean with warm soapy water and repurpose the heavyweight embossed glass jar for jewellery, cotton pads, desk essentials or bathroom storage—beautiful, practical, and sustainable.

🎁 GIFT READY Part of our curated Silk Road Collection, inspired by historic trade routes and tranquil landscapes. Thoughtfully packaged and ready to gift for housewarmings, birthdays, thank-you gifts or elegant everyday self-care—a timeless choice for candle lovers and home décor enthusiasts.
description: TIANSHUI BLUE SEA SALT CANDLE – COASTAL SERENITY FOR YOUR HOME Bring a sense of calm into your space with the fresh, uplifting scent of sea salt and cool ocean air. This premium double-wick candle is housed in an elegant Tianshui blue embossed glass jar, designed to elevate both your ambience and your interior with effortless coastal refinement. WHAT MAKES IT SPECIAL Fresh Coastal Fragrance Clean sea salt, cool ozone and crisp air notes create a light, spa-like atmosphere that feels refreshing rather than overpowering. Embossed Blue Glass Design Richly tinted Tianshui blue glass features an ornate diamond lattice pattern that softly reflects light, adding understated elegance to shelves, tables and bedside displays. Clean, Even Burn Performance Two cotton wicks provide approximately 20 hours of balanced burning, delivering consistent fragrance throw and a smooth, even melt with no tunnelling. Perfectly Proportioned Size H 8.5 cm × Ø 10.5 cm — compact enough for smaller spaces, yet impactful enough to stand out in living rooms, bathrooms and bedrooms. Protective Decorative Lid A matching embossed lid keeps the candle protected between uses while completing the refined, vintage-inspired look. Reusable Keepsake Jar Once finished, the heavyweight glass vessel can be repurposed as elegant storage for jewellery, cosmetics, cotton pads or desk essentials. THE SILK ROAD COLLECTION Part of our curated Silk Road Collection, inspired by timeless craftsmanship and distinctive fragrances. Each candle arrives beautifully packaged and ready to gift for housewarmings, birthdays, thank-you gestures, or as a refined everyday indulgence. QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST Crafted with dual cotton wicks and a carefully formulated wax blend, this candle is designed for a smooth, even burn and consistent scent from first light to final glow. The decorative glass jar is made to be enjoyed long after the candle has burned down. A refined choice for calm interiors, thoughtful gifting, and everyday moments of coastal serenity.
